allow: Bash(npx --yes shadcn@latest add button card input label table badge dialog dropdown-menu select sonner separator tabs skeleton --yes --overwrite)

Bash(node -e "const {MongoClient}=require\('mongodb'\);\(async\(\)=>{try{const c=await new MongoClient\('mongodb://localhost:27017'\).connect\(\);const db=c.db\('blessings_wedding'\);const r=await db.collection\('rsvps'\).deleteMany\({email:'ada@example.com'}\);const a=await db.collection\('admins'\).deleteMany\({email:'second@ofodimma.com'}\);const s=await db.collection\('settings'\).deleteOne\({_id:'global'}\);const admins=await db.collection\('admins'\).find\({}\).project\({email:1,role:1,_id:0}\).toArray\(\);const rc=await db.collection\('rsvps'\).countDocuments\(\);process.stdout.write\('CLEANED rsvps='+r.deletedCount+' admins='+a.deletedCount+' settings='+s.deletedCount+' | remaining_admins='+JSON.stringify\(admins\)+' rsvp_count='+rc+'\\n'\);await c.close\(\);}catch\(e\){process.stdout.write\('ERR:'+e.message+'\\n'\);}}\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('radix-ui'\); console.log\('Switch' in r ? 'Switch EXPORTED' : 'no Switch'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(r\).filter\(k=>/Switch|Label|Tabs|Separator/.test\(k\)\).join\(','\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const o=require\('otpauth'\); console.log\('TOTP', typeof o.TOTP, 'Secret', typeof o.Secret\); const s=new o.Secret\({size:20}\); console.log\('base32 len', s.base32.length\); const t=new o.TOTP\({issuer:'x',label:'y',secret:s}\); const tok=t.generate\(\); console.log\('token', tok, 'validate', t.validate\({token:tok, window:1}\)\);")
